description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a fabric-covered fuselage and dual straight wings, each adorned with roundel insignias. The aircraft features an open cockpit situated between the upper and lower wings, with visible struts and wire bracing supporting the wing structure. Twin piston engines are mounted between the wings, each driving a wooden propeller. The tail section is characterized by a twin vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both with red and white markings. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a tail skid, suitable for early aviation designs. The overall color scheme is a light beige with red, white, and blue accents.
description: A vintage biplane with dual straight wings, open cockpit, twin piston engines, and a twin-tail design, finished in beige with red, white, and blue markings.
description_view_0: Top-down rear view showing the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the roundel insignias on the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual engines with propellers, open cockpit, and the symmetrical biplane wing structure.
description_view_2: Top-down front view displaying the cockpit, engine placement, and the roundel insignias on the wings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the structure of the tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing biplane with two straight, parallel wings connected by struts and wires; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted between the wings, each with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open cockpit located forward of the wing center section, single-seat configuration.
